results.rendered_html:
tripattra (tri + pattra)
1〉 m. Aegle Marmelos Corr. (vilva)  RĀJAN. _im_ ŚKDR.   NIGH. PR.  ūrdhvapattraṃ haro jñeyaḥ pattraṃ vāmaṃ vidhiḥ svayam . ahaṃ (Viṣṇu spricht) dakṣiṇapattraṃ ca tripattradalamityuta ..  BṚHADDHARMA-P. _im_ ŚKDR.  Vgl. trijaṭā.
— 2〉 wohl n. = caṇḍālakanda ein best. Knollengewächs  NIGH. PR.
